name: combinate
description: An interactive ι (iota) / SKI combinator-calculus sandbox.
author: Matthias Pall Gissurarson <mpg@mpg.is>

scripts.build:wasm: npm run gen:rules && (cd crates/refold && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --release) && rm -f crates/refold/pkg/.gitignore && (cd crates/reduce && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --release) && rm -f crates/reduce/pkg/.gitignore
